name: Clown Crew Dristy
effectText:
2 Ritual, Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, and/or Pendulum Monsters
Your Tribute Summoned monsters can make a second attack during each Battle Phase. If this card is Tributed: You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect of "Clown Crew Dristy" once per turn);
●Return all Link Monsters from the field and the GYs to the Extra Deck.
●Each player with a hand shuffles their entire hand into the Deck, then draws the same number of cards they shuffled into the Deck.
